title: Tarzan Escapes
director: Richard Thorpe, John Farrow, James C. McKay
writer: Cyril Hume, Edgar Rice Burroughs, Jack Cummings
actors: Johnny Weissmuller, Maureen O'Sullivan, John Buckler
plot: An expedition seeking to bring Jane back to civilization, and Tarzan into captivity, gets more than it's bargained for.
